since_last: 24% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.41%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.41% · BTC -2.15% · Gold -2.08% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 24% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.41%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.41%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -8.56%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.00%, ARM +6.97%, SMR +6.02%, MRVL +5.45%, AMAT +4.81%. Laggards: SPCX -8.56%, SNAP -7.27%, APP -6.22%, AI -5.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.56% at $193.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
